entry.em: ..FLOOD WATCH IN EFFECT THROUGH THURSDAY MORNING
entry.data: SEVERE THUNDERSTORM WATCH 11 IN EFFECT UNTIL 9 PM CST THIS EVENING

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY BE SEVERE THIS EVENING
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS, MAINLY IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS, MAINLY IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 40S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE MORNING, THEN PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE AFTERNOON
COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT
